prediction.reasoning: Based on ZTS (Zoetis) being a stable large-cap pharmaceutical/animal health company with relatively low volatility, I estimated a modest upward drift of ~0.06% daily over 20 days. The prediction incorporates typical stock volatility of ~1.2% daily standard deviation, resulting in a 20-day volatility of approximately 5.4%. The confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty ranges: 50% CI spans ±2.2%, 80% CI spans ±4.2%, and 90% CI spans ±6.3% around the point estimate.
